stories.summary: Phase 19: Foundational — migrate Instagram service into pile-app/
Phase 20: US1 — Scrape Instagram into pile (P1, MVP)
Phase 21: US2 — Pipeline service survives upstream throttling (P1)
Phase 22: US3 — Pile via bridge-app / physical segregation (P2)
Phase 23: US4 — Scrape a Substack publication into the pile (P2)
Phase 24: US5 — Pipeline services run on a recurring schedule (P3)
Phase 25: US6 — A new pipeline service is added for a new source (P3)
Phase 27: US7 — Self-healing scrapes survive mid-run failure cleanly (P1)

closed_in_overhaul_2026_05_29.summary: T028: location.py — Claude-only IATA determination [pre-overhaul subtask of OCS-83]
T029: instagram.py — instagrapi auth + since-timestamp fetch + idempotency [pre-overhaul subtask of OCS-83]
T030: Wire location resolution into the ingestion loop [pre-overhaul subtask of OCS-83]
T031: Trip assignment logic (FR-040) [pre-overhaul subtask of OCS-83]
T032: Media download to public/media/<stop_id>.{jpg|mp4} [pre-overhaul subtask of OCS-83]
T034: Session error handling — SMTP alert email and clean exit [pre-overhaul subtask of OCS-83]
T036: scheduler.py — APScheduler BackgroundScheduler wired into FastAPI lifespan [pre-overhaul subtask of OCS-83]

notes: 2026-05-29: Spec overhaul (initiated 2026-05-27) replaced Phases 1–3 (T028–T049) with Phases 18–26 (T200–T253). Per Cardinal Rule #1 nuance, envisioned-but-not-started tasks were discarded.

2026-05-29: Pre-overhaul Stories OCS-83, OCS-84, OCS-85 and their seven OCS-87…OCS-93 subtasks were transitioned to Done (the only terminal transition available in this project's workflow). T033 (Graph API fallback) was never created in Jira; T035 (CLI login) was originally rate-limit-blocked on 2026-05-25 and remains uncreated.

2026-05-29: New Stories OCS-96 through OCS-101 created for Phases 18, 19, 21, 22, 25, 26 in the first sync pass. Phases 20, 23, 24 were originally Cloudflare-WAF-blocked on the first attempt; resynced sequentially as OCS-103 (Phase 20), OCS-104 (Phase 23), OCS-105 (Phase 24). Mapping is now complete — all 10 new Stories exist in Jira.
2026-06-01: Phase 27 (Self-healing scrapes US7) added via drift recon (T254-T257); created as OCS-106 and transitioned to Done. Stories-only per convention since all four tasks completed before sync.

Subtasks for new Phases 18–26 are intentionally NOT created — stories-only per team convention for not-yet-started work; subtasks added once implementation begins on a given phase (mirrors the 2026-05-25 OCS-83 pattern).
Per Cardinal Rule #2 (no PM state in synced artifacts), status / sprint / owner fields are intentionally absent from this mapping. Track per-issue status in Jira directly.
